meaning: n.标记,符号,记号,征兆,迹象,征候v.签名(于),署名(于)～,签署
examples: I'm looking at the small print; I don't want to sign anything that I shouldn't sign.
He shows no sign of repentance.
At the first sign of a strengthening dollar, you should sell the bond, she says.
The sign was one of several handed out by sports blog Saturday Down South.
